story.text:
# ✨ Prove Without Revealing
**🔐(witness) → 🔮(prover) → 📜(proof) → 👁️(verifier-sees-nothing-new)**
*aletheia · zk · V38*

Produce a ZK proof. The proof carries enough to verify; the secret stays.

> Soundness without disclosure. The verifier learns the truth and nothing else.

*Keywords:* prove · zk-proof · soundness · v25
